acceptance_results.criterion: Baseline identifies the slow admin startup segment.
acceptance_results.reason: Clean-worktree npm install exceeded five minutes before termination, proving the wait happens before Angular serve starts.

acceptance_results.criterion: dev-admin skips npm install when node_modules is current and still installs when missing or stale.
acceptance_results.reason: The recipe checks node_modules and node_modules/.package-lock.json against package-lock.json before running npm install.

acceptance_results.criterion: Admin dev server starts on a configured free port after the patch.
acceptance_results.reason: Warm-start smoke returned rc=0 in 8185 ms and Angular logged Local: http://localhost:4420/.

cleanup_notes: Temporary node_modules symlink, admin log, and pid file created for smoke verification were removed.
No long-running admin dev-server process remains from this session.
completed_work: Created TMP-059 classified defect issue and work order.
Measured the admin startup bottleneck as npm dependency setup before Angular serve.
Patched dev-admin to skip npm install on warm starts and make install work visible when required.
Patched readiness to check the configured listening port instead of depending on a localhost log line.
known_gaps: Fresh checkouts without node_modules still need npm install and therefore depend on npm cache or registry speed.
The smoke used existing installed dependencies from the main checkout via a temporary symlink because the isolated worktree had no node_modules and clean npm install exceeded five minutes.
operator_message: TMP-059 is complete: repeated make dev admin startup now skips npm install when dependencies are current.
risk_notes: No dependency manifest, lockfile, admin source, backend service, schema, or production build behavior changed.
summary: Reduced repeated admin dev startup latency by skipping npm install when webspa-admin dependencies are already current and by checking the listening port for readiness.

validation.output_excerpt: assignment_decision allow; no blocking or review reasons
Admin Panel dependencies current; skipping npm install. Admin Panel started on port 4420. rc=0 elapsed_ms=8185
ok true; only historical/schedulable warnings including known gitignore drift
